title: Eclipse Client
description: Remade a launcher gameplay : mods like popular clients
body:
<details>
<summary>How to use</summary>

  **If you want to convert a .mrpack ➡️ .zip you can go on [this site](https://tutorialy.net/mrpacktozip/).**

  **And to active the modpack follow [this video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KnWhbbh1wUM).**
</details>
<details>
<summary>How to support</summary>

  **Click on the heart for support the pack**
</details>
<details>
<summary>Upgrade my Modpack</summary>
  
  **[Distant horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)
or
  [Voxy](https://modrinth.com/mod/voxy)**
to enhance your render distance !
</details>

The modpack is completly **Client Side else the Voice Chat (Simple Voice Chat)**
# What is _Eclipse Client_ ?
I tried to make a funny modpack playable like a popular client.
![Seperation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68f37fa4c468a68a2d9f208969ace60fa696741e_0.webp)
## Features :
### 🖥️Screen
- 👁️Clear overlay like portal, pumkin, spyglass, nausea, darkness, blindness, freeze and vignette
- 🚫Remove fog and clear lava, water and snowpowder
- 🔥Customize fire and shield offset
- 💡Customize Gamma
- 🗿Small totem pop and extensive customizability of the pop animation.
### ⚔️PvP :
- 🛜Crystal, Anchor and Cart optimizer
- 📦Customize hitbox look
- 💥Hide explosion effecs
- 🐞Fix shield glitch
- 🛡️Shield statue
- 💖Show health
### ℹ️HUD :
- 🌍Show Coordinate, Framerate, speed, Biome, Light Level, Hour (in game)
- 🫗Show Potion effect
- ⛑️Minimalist vanilla-like widget to display your armor items and their durability
- ⌨️Displays keybinds on hotbar slots
- 🛜Adds a configurable numerical ping display to the player list
- 🍎Food/hunger-related HUD improvements
### ✅Utilities :
- ⚙️Add setting profile
- 🖱️Add zoom, minimap (waypoint), mouse tweaks and mod menu
- 🉑Remove loading screen and adds fallbacks for languages
- 🎙️Add voice chat
- 🧠Client feature (friend, chat, cosmetic, host world for free)
- 🔴Rec your game to do cinematic
- 💬Chat imporved (more meesage, animation, hour, copy message)
- 🛜See the ping of other player
- 📦See in shulker box
- 🖥️Better command block UI and NBT suggestion
### 💖Aesthetic :
- 👋🏻Add animations for third person and other player
- 🧊Render the player skin layer in 3d
- 💬Add head when player send a message
- 👓Add shader, motion blur, connected and emessive texture
- 🍎Item physic
- 🔦Dynamic light
### 🧬Optimizations
- Sodium
- Lithium
- Immediatly fast
- 👀Entity, faces and leave culling
- 🛜Network optimisation
- 🐞Debug
  
![Seperation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68f37fa4c468a68a2d9f208969ace60fa696741e_0.webp)
## Future :
Improve the modrinth page.
Add other version
